reminder.notes:
Release v2.18.27

A one-time "what's new" prompt now explains the location-based reminders feature after updating, with a clear skip option (dismissible by button or tapping outside) for anyone who'd rather not read it.

ai-scanner.notes: AI models are no longer bundled in the APK -- they now download once (first launch only) and are cached across all future updates. APK size: ~732MB -> ~218MB. Also fixes a crash in the model-download path (kotlinx-serialization plugin misconfiguration under AGP9).
